_comment: Byproduct of the 2026-07-24 city-data unification. Cities with a dedicated /us/[state]/[city] page but ZERO matching providers in the coverage DB (no city-specific, statewide, or primaryState coverage). Flagged noProviders:true in data/cities-full.ts and excluded from the sitemap. These are demand-side coverage holes = provider-recruitment targets. Cross-reference against institutional inquiries and directory search logs to prioritize. Regenerate: npx tsx scripts/unify-cities-full.ts --dry-run
note: All 14 states below have NO provider coverage at all — recruiting one statewide/nationwide provider per state lights up every city in it.
